entry.title: IDC DEAM3609GO29035 (10) awarded to HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
ENERGY SAVINGS PERFORMANCE CONTRACT
THIS MODIFICATION EXERCISES OPTION PERIOD 2, AND CHANGES THE CONTRACTING OFFICERS REPRESENTATIVE(COR), CONTRACT SPECIALIST, AND PROGRAM OFFICIAL.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC DEAM3609GO29035 (11) awarded to HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TAS::89 0321::TAS
ENERGY SAVINGS PERFORMANCE CONTRACT
MODIFICATION TO ADD THE PROJECT MANAGEMENT CENTER REQUIREMENT, DUE DATES FOR DELIVERABLES AND OTHER MISC ADMINISTRATIVE CLARIFICATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC DEAM3609GO29035 (2) awarded to HONEYWELL INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
ENERGY SAVINGS PERFORMANCE CONTRACT
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REPLACE SECTION H.3, SECTION G.1, ATTACHMENT J-1 AND ATTACHMENT J-2; ADD CLAUSE 52.209-9; AND REINCORPORATE ATTACHMENT J-13 THAT WAS PREVIOUSLY OMITTED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
